<type>file</type>
<content>1: ## 2025-05-14 - Optimized Knowledge Graph Edge Processing
2: **Learning:** Nested loops iterating over large collections (Documents x Edges) create a significant O(N*M) performance bottleneck. Pre-mapping related entities into a hash map (dictionary) reduces this to O(N+M), providing a nearly 30x speedup in this specific RAG ingestion pipeline.
3: **Action:** Always check for nested loop patterns when joining data from multiple collections (like Nodes and Edges) and prioritize hash-based lookups.

(End of file - total 3 lines)
</content>","title":".Jules/bolt.md","metadata":{"preview":"## 2025-05-14 - Optimized Knowledge Graph Edge Processing

**Action:** Always check for nested loop patterns when joining data from multiple collections (like Nodes and Edges) and prioritize hash-based lookups.","truncated":false,"loaded":[]},"time":{"start":1774269977682,"end":1774269977682}}}}
